panels.title: 磁盘使用率
用户代码错误请求个数
用户代码错误请求比例

targets.expr:
100 *
(
  sum by (path) (
    rate(code_errors_total{error_type="fj_server_err", instance=~"$worker_node"}[30s])
  )
  or on (path)
  (0 * sum by (path) (rate(starlette_requests_total{instance=~"$worker_node"}[30s])))
)
/
clamp_min(
  sum by (path) (
    rate(starlette_requests_total{instance=~"$worker_node"}[30s])
  ),
  1
)

sum by (path) (
  increase(code_errors_total{error_type="web_server_exception", instance=~"$worker_node"}[1m])
)
or on (path)
(0 * sum by (path) (starlette_requests_total{instance=~"$worker_node"}))

100 *
(
  (
    sum by (path) (
      increase(code_errors_total{error_type="web_server_exception", instance=~"$worker_node"}[1m])
    )
    or on (path)
    (0 * sum by (path) (increase(starlette_requests_total{instance=~"$worker_node"}[1m])))
  )
  /
  sum by (path) (
    increase(starlette_requests_total{instance=~"$worker_node"}[1m])
  )
)
and on (path)
(
  sum by (path) (increase(starlette_requests_total{instance=~"$worker_node"}[30s])) > 0
)
or on (path)
(
  0 * sum by (path) (increase(starlette_requests_total{instance=~"$worker_node"}[30s]))
)

panels.description: 因并发达到上限（MAX_CONCURRENT_SANDBOXES），在队列中等待超时的请求个数
panels.title: 排队超时请求个数

panels.description: 因并发达到上限而在队列中等待超时的请求占总请求的比例

targets.expr:
(sum by (path) (
  rate(code_errors_total{error_type="queue_timeout", instance=~"$worker_node"}[30s])) or vector(0))
  /
sum by (path) (
  rate(starlette_requests_total{instance=~"$worker_node"}[30s]))
 * 100

panels.title: 排队超时请求比例

panels.description: 计算公式：排队个数/总请求数

targets.expr:
(
  sum(increase(ss_tcp_listen_recvq_sum[30s])) or vector(0)
)
/
clamp_min(
  ((sum(increase(starlette_requests_total{instance=~"$worker_node"}[30s])) or vector(0))
  + 
  (sum(increase(ss_tcp_listen_recvq_sum[30s])) or vector(0))),
  1
)
* 100

panels.title: 请求排队率
